changes.comment: Major release: complete web component library with 30+ accessible, themeable components (Button, Dialog, Drawer, Form, Select, Combobox, Toast, Tabs, Accordion, and more); signals-based reactivity via @vielzeug/craftit integration; CSS custom property theming system with dark-mode support; framework adapters for React, Vue 3, Svelte, and Angular; full ARIA compliance and keyboard navigation across all components
